title: Peeled Armor
description: A simple, minimal armor + trims resource pack made to show off the player's skin.
body: This is a simple resource pack I made for myself that retextures all armor pieces (Including leather, chainmail, and the turtle helmet) to remove the chest plate, reduce the size of the actual armor, and show off more of the player's skin. Netherite has been retextured to fit the original armor's profile, as well.
